hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'vercel' in cmd.lower() and 'version' not in cmd.lower():
    print('Running tests before Vercel deploy...', flush=True)
    r = subprocess.run(['npm', 'test'], cwd='/Users/willcolan/Developer/Claude Code/sound-of-right-now')
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print('Tests failed — deploy blocked. Fix tests before deploying.', flush=True)
        sys.exit(1)
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if '/src/music/' in fp:
    print(f'Music file changed — running tests...', flush=True)
    subprocess.run(['npm', 'test'], cwd='/Users/willcolan/Developer/Claude Code/sound-of-right-now')
"
